transformations.name: Feature engineering
transformations.description: Added IMC (Body Mass Index) calculated from weight and height
transformations.justification: IMC is a clinically relevant indicator of body composition

transformations.name: ECG signal features
transformations.description: Added std_mv (standard deviation of ECG signal)
transformations.justification: Captures variability in the ECG signal, which may differ between Normal and Anormal patients
